title: Certified Nursing Assistant
description: Provide compassionate patient care at AstraZeneca as a Certified Nursing Assistant, supporting our nursing team and patients.
responsibilities: Assist patients with activities of daily living
Help patients transfer and mobilize safely
Monitor patient comfort and report changes to nursing staff
Provide emotional support and comfort care

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
